name: hivespace
description: Work with your Hivespace team from a local coding session via the hivespace CLI. Bundles the hivespace skill with a SessionStart hook that loads the skill instructions, TEAM.md, memory/MEMORY.md, and memory/coding/CODING.md into context at the start of every session. Pairs with the `hivespace fs upload-sessions` command for uploading local coding-agent sessions to the team drive.
